title.description: A clear, descriptive document name/title, or null if no meaningful title can be determined

correspondent.description: The person or organization this document relates to, or null if unclear

documentType.description: The category of document (e.g., Invoice, Receipt, Contract), or null if unclear

title.description: Confidence score for the suggested title (0.0 to 1.0)

correspondent.description: Confidence score for the correspondent classification (0.0 to 1.0)

documentType.description: Confidence score for the document type classification (0.0 to 1.0)

tags.description: Confidence score for the tag classifications (0.0 to 1.0)

evidence.description: Short evidence snippet from the document text supporting the classification decisions
